ksa_text: Build organizational data and AI culture through executive sponsorship, success story amplification, recognition programs, visible leadership commitment to data-informed decision-making, and cultural transformation initiatives.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the task contains explicit executive/organizational scope signals ('executive sponsor'), placing it above IC-to-senior-IC Data Engineer level. STRM composite score is strong (0.4525, top tier for this dataset); semantic alignment with data frameworks may be present, but the described responsibilities involve setting or leading organizational programs rather than executing technical data work. Data Engineers implement within structures they do not establish.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.

decision_rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the task contains explicit executive/organizational scope signals ('executive sponsor'), placing it above IC-to-senior-IC Data Engineer level.
